heading: Prerequisites
body:
To complete this tutorial, you must have the following:

- A MongoDB Atlas cluster running MongoDB version 6.0.11 or later.
  Ensure that your IP address is in your project's
  [access list](atlas/security/ip-access-list).

- An [OpenAI API Key](https://platform.openai.com/api-keys) to use
  OpenAI's embedding and chat completion models.

- A terminal configured with the following:

  - Python 3.10 or later.

  - An environment to run interactive Python notebooks, such as
    [VS Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/datascience/jupyter-notebooks)
    or [Jupyter Notebook](https://jupyter.org/install).
